nodes.label: Stream-JSON protocol
nodes.rationale: Each stdout line from iclaude.sh is a single JSON object. Non-JSON lines (banners, ANSI) are silently ignored. Lines starting with '{' are parsed as stream-json events.

nodes.label: Non-fatal evaluator: quality scoring that never blocks main flow
nodes.rationale: Evaluator failures are intentionally swallowed to keep quality scoring non-blocking — a failed eval should never prevent a wiki result from being delivered.
nodes.norm_label: non-fatal evaluator: quality scoring that never blocks main flow

nodes.label: MIPROv2 prompt optimization pattern
nodes.rationale: Uses DSPy MIPROv2 with auto=light and no bootstrapped/labeled demos to perform lightweight prompt optimization; post-optimization placeholder restoration ensures template variables survive rewriting.

attributes.rationale: Replaces IclaudeRunner/runner.ts/prompt.ts with ClaudeCliClient implementing LlmClient; AgentRunner orchestrates phases; 9 tasks covering types, client, runner, phases, controller, settings, main.ts migration
Adds OpKey, OpMap<T>, ClaudeOperationConfig, NativeOperationConfig; AgentRunner.buildOptsFor(op) selects per-operation model; settings UI toggle for per-operation sections
Moves domain storage from external JSON file to Obsidian settings.domains[]; runInit yields domain_created event; Controller intercepts and saves domain; EditDomainModal added
Animated bubble timer in chat; JSONL logging in dispatchChat; collapsible chat section with chatToggle/chatOpen/chatBodyEl fields
init auto-creates _schema.md, _index.md, _log.md if missing; templates/_schema.md bundled; esbuild .md text loader; ensureRootFiles() checks existence before writing
Phase system prompts extracted to prompts/*.md; render() for {{var}} substitution; DevModeSettings with logPath/evaluatorModel; AgentRunner writes JSONL dev logs; evaluator phase yields eval_result
prompts/base.md contains base agent contract; buildChatParams() prepends base contract to first system message; order: baseContract + phasePrompt + userPrompt
Python scripts in scripts/dspy/ using MIPROv2; loader.py reads JSONL dev logs; ClaudeCodeLM spawns claude CLI; optimizer.py runs MIPRO; writer.py saves to prompts/optimized/<op>.md
Renames devMode.logPath to devMode.logDir (directory only); fixed filename dev.jsonl inside logDir; migration strips old logPath
consolidateSourcePaths adds ancestor, removes covered descendants; extractParentSourcePath returns vault-relative parent dir; detectDomain matches by source_paths prefix
ClaudeCliConfig gains tmpDir; LARGE_THRESHOLD=32768 bytes; large args written to temp files passed via --append-system-prompt-file / --system-prompt-file; cleanup in finally block
Removes mandatory ## Связанные концепции section; adds links frontmatter field to _schema.md masking table; updates ingest.md JSON example
Comprehensive refactor replacing repoRoot with vaultRoot throughout all phases and controller; app.vault.adapter.getBasePath() as single source
Generalizes lastLint to lastContext {operation, domainId, report}; chat shown after ingest/query/lint/query-save; setRunning() resets chat; controller.lintChat() renamed to chat()
system RunEvent gains sessionId; ClaudeCliConfig gains resumeSessionId; passes --resume <id> on resume turns; WikiController._chatSessionId persists session between turns

AddDomainInput gains sourcePaths[]; FileErrorModal (Skip/Retry/Stop); FolderSuggest autocomplete; two-phase init with --sources: analyze entity_types then runIngest per file; new RunEvent kinds: init_start, file_start, file_done

nodes.label: Plan: Schema Sync, Wiki Path, Settings Lock

attributes.rationale: Three independent features: WIKI_ROOT='!Wiki' constant + domainWikiFolder(); migrateDomainWikiFolder() strips prefix on load; WikiController.running getter + onBusyChange; settings UI disables Edit/Delete while running

nodes.norm_label: plan: schema sync, wiki path, settings lock

nodes.label: Plan: README Value Proposition + Dev Link

attributes.rationale: Two edits to README.md: add value proposition block with Почему LLM Wiki list; replace blockquote dev link with ## Документация section

nodes.norm_label: plan: readme value proposition + dev link

attributes.rationale: TypeScript class implementing LlmClient; spawns claude/iclaude.sh subprocess; parses stream-json stdout; converts to OpenAI chunk format; supports resumeSessionId; handles E2BIG via temp files
Minimal OpenAI-compatible interface used by all agent phases; allows swapping between Claude CLI and native OpenAI-compatible backends
Orchestrator class accepting LlmClient + settings + domains; routes WikiOperation to phase functions; replaced IclaudeRunner-based approach; buildOptsFor(op) selects per-operation config
Union type: ingest | query | query-save | lint | init | chat | fix — defines all supported agent operations

Streaming union type covering: system, tool_use, tool_result, assistant_text, result, error, exit, ask_user, domain_created, domain_updated, source_path_added, eval_result, init_start, file_start, file_done
Core data structure: {id, name, wiki_folder, source_paths?, entity_types?, language_notes?}; wiki_folder stores subfolder only (e.g. 'os'), not full path
Pure function; adds new source path while replacing deeper covered descendants; called by controller on source_path_added events
Returns vault-relative direct parent directory of a source file; signature (absSource, vaultRoot)
Matches source file path to domain by source_paths prefix; falls back to first domain; uses vaultRoot
WIKI_ROOT='!Wiki' constant; domainWikiFolder(subfolder)='!Wiki/'+subfolder; all phases use this instead of reading domain.wiki_folder directly
Strips '!Wiki/' prefix from stored wiki_folders on settings load; called in loadSettings for backward compatibility
Replaces {{var}} placeholders in prompt template strings; used by all phase prompt builders
Runs after each operation in dev mode; parseEvalResponse() + runEvaluator(); yields eval_result event with score; AgentRunner.updateDevLogEval() updates JSONL
Python uv project; MIPROv2 optimizer; reads JSONL dev logs; ClaudeCodeLM spawns claude CLI; outputs optimized prompts to prompts/optimized/<op>.md
Writes large userText or systemContent (>32KB) to temp files; passes via --append-system-prompt-file / --system-prompt-file; cleanup in finally; prevents ENAMETOOLONG on Linux
resumeSessionId in ClaudeCliConfig; passes --resume <id> flag; skips --system-prompt on resume turns; WikiController._chatSessionId persists between chat turns
WikiController.running getter + onBusyChange callback; settings panel disables Edit/Delete domain buttons while operation active
{enabled, logDir, evaluatorModel}; logDir is directory only, fixed filename dev.jsonl inside; AgentRunner writes per-operation JSONL logs
OpKey, OpMap<T>, ClaudeOperationConfig, NativeOperationConfig — each WikiOperation can have distinct model/maxTokens/temperature
When --sources present: phase 1 analyses sources to extract entity_types; phase 2 calls runIngest per file; FileErrorModal handles per-file errors with Skip/Retry/Stop
Exposes vaultRoot getter (app.vault.adapter.getBasePath()); consolidateSourcePaths, extractParentSourcePath, detectDomain utility functions
